records.ety: [F. viande meat, food, LL. vianda, vivanda, vivenda, properly, things to live on, fr. L. vivere to live; akin to vivus living. See Vivid, and cf. Victuals.]

defs: An article of food; provisions; food; victuals; -- used chiefly in the plural.
quotes: Viands of various kinds allure the taste.
